reviews.review_description:
Good game but it's a bit of a scam.  All zones have 5 levels except the last two zones which have 1 level.  Why?  So there's really only 3 zones and 2 bonus levels.  Not 5 zones like you would think from playing the demo.  Which is simply not enough levels.  Similar to Element TD2 on Steam but that game has 25 stages, 55 waves per stage, 3 difficulties, multiplayer, endless...  
Even though this is probably the best TD game on Quest it still comes up short.

developer_response.body: Hi RCollaborator, I have now totally reworked the hub world, so it's absolutely clear how many levels there are. I understand and agree that the old hub world was misleading - that's why I improved it.

reviews.review_description:
simple enough experience but great fun
The different attack patterns of the different gem combinations make for some pretty changeable gameplay. 
well worth the tenner.

developer_response.body: Great to see you like the gems and attack patterns, they are what makes the game unique, after all :D Thanks for the feedback, Yewneek!

reviews.review_description: Great addictive gameplay, with cute animations.  Easy to pickup and start playing.  Great game for starting off with the quest for the first time (minimal motion sickness).

Fun little tower defense game. It's pretty challenging and the developer personally respond on discord.  It's going to take me quite a few hours to beat this, on level 11 after 5 hours or so.  For under $10 go for it.

25% off links: 25off.miketunes .com

Graphics looks good. Gameplay seems to be interesting (so far). Controls/UI are not well designed. For example, to click a button, you need to put your finger at the button and press trigger. And there's no easy way to move the map -- should've allowed me to move by pressing one or both grab buttons. Several other UI design decisions require more steps than necessary, or is not as intuitive as it could be. I would give 4 stars if not for the cheap price.
It's fun and addictive! A bit hard to remember the target zones of each wizard, but I guess it's part of the game and the path to better skill.

developer_response.body: Hi rihadavid, thanks for playing. I hope you get to know the wizards, so when you see a new map or hat, you just know the perfect wizard to call :D Best of luck. - Shaun

reviews.review_title: Amazing Tower defense game like Bloons
reviews.review_description:
I was around for the very first Bloons flash game on the web, and saw it get increasingly sophisticated over time and move to become a phone app game, and this game gives me so much nostalgia for the early Bloons!

It is truly a delight to be able to set up wizards and upgrade them as they whittle down the enemies along the tracks. And there's a little bit of depth too since the wizards all have different attack patterns so you'll have to make certain ones to maximize their effectiveness in certain maps. 

Some suggestions to make the game better are to add a stop/pause function, and allow players to zoom in/out, tilt, and freely move the map like in Demeo. I play sitting down, but it's hard to lean forward all the time to look behind certain parts of the track.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! I've added a stop/pause function, and map position controls (no tilt control, sorry). Bloons was a key inspiration for the game, too.

reviews.review_description: I've only played for about an hour but this game is a fun tower defense game!  The wizards and board you play on are cute and I like the real time turning mechanism of the wizards.  I'm looking forward to try to get perfect on every level

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing, korvkorv,  I'm so happy you enjoyed it! Good luck getting a perfect score :D

reviews.review_description: I’ve never really liked tower defense before but this is actually really fun. I’d recommend!

developer_response.body: That's great to hear! Thanks for the feedback :D

reviews.review_description: Tilted view or adjustable table height  would be a great plus for a more comfortable gameplay!

One of the best "tower defense" games out there. I love it. It’s excellently implemented, lovingly staged, offers plenty of room for personal strategies, and is incredibly fun. Plus, great mixed reality. I have no complaints, except one: please add more levels!!

developer_response.body: I'd love to add more levels if enough people enjoy the game. Thanks for the feedback, Lord Wyldbit :D

reviews.review_title: Exactly what i imagined VR tower defense
reviews.review_description: So much simple fun the passthrough and hand tracking are the perfect touch to be able to lay in bed and play with my hands free. A but challenging but i appreciate that. Also i was surprised by how varied the maps and levels are.  My gf wishes you could pick up the wizards to look at and examine kind if like demeo. Looks fantastic btw

developer_response.body: Hi Truth7, you can now pick up wizards and move them! Thanks for helping me improve the game, your feedback has been wonderful.

reviews.review_description: This game offers a relaxing experience with a cheerful theme and enough depth and challenges to keep players engaged. The well-designed VR mechanics and beautiful perspective make it a great, affordable choice for all players.
Great game, highly recommend to try it

Great game, very well polished graphics. Only had a chance to play the first few levels. Hopefully with the different wizard options I hope they are utilized till to you get the right combo in future levels.  Great value and my only hope are longe levels and additional paid / free dlc.

I just tried your game and it's just great.  The models and interface are pleasant and designed at a high level, the gameplay is fun and exciting.  Great game, if anyone likes tower defense, be sure to try it.

developer_response.body: Happy to hear that you enjoyed it, netkot :)
